sourcesContent:
import React from 'react';
import PizzaList from './components/PizzaList';
import pizzaImage from './pizza.png';
import {
  PageWrapper,
  Main,
  Container,
  Header,
  HeaderContent,
  Logo,
  CartText,
  Banner,
  BannerText,
  Category,
  Title,
  Footer,
  FooterText,
  GlobalStyle
} from './styles/styles';

// Dados de exemplo para pizzas
const pizzas = [
  {
    id: 1,
    name: 'Margherita',
    description: 'Molho de tomate, mussarela, manjericão fresco.',
    price: 25.99,
    image: 'https://images.pexels.com/photos/4109081/pexels-photo-4109081.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=1200',
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    name: 'Pepperoni',
    description: 'Molho de tomate, mussarela, pepperoni.',
    price: 29.99,
    image: 'https://images.pexels.com/photos/315755/pexels-photo-315755.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=1200',
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    name: 'Quatro Queijos',
    description: 'Molho de tomate, mussarela, gorgonzola, parmesão, provolone.',
    price: 32.99,
    image: 'https://images.pexels.com/photos/261997/pexels-photo-261997.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=1200',
  },
];

function App() {
  return (
    <PageWrapper>
      <GlobalStyle />
      <Header>
        <Container>
          <HeaderContent>
            <Logo>Efood</Logo>
            <CartText>0 produto(s) no carrinho</CartText>
          </HeaderContent>
        </Container>
      </Header>
      <Main>
        <Banner image={pizzaImage}>
          <Container>
            <BannerText>
              <Category>Italiana</Category>
              <Title>La Dolce Vita Trattoria</Title>
            </BannerText>
          </Container>
        </Banner>
        <Container>
          <PizzaList pizzas={pizzas} />
        </Container>
      </Main>
      <Footer>
        <Container>
          <FooterText>© 2023 Efood. Todos os direitos reservados.</FooterText>
        </Container>
      </Footer>
    </PageWrapper>
  );
}

export default App;
